name: Walnut Roll
recipeIngredient: OR 1  Cake Dry Yeast                2    Eggs, well beaten
4 tbsp Melted Shortening                   6 c  White Flour
2 cup Milk, scalded and cooled            2 c  Walnuts, ground
recipeInstructions:
1. Soften yeast in lukewarm milk.
2. Add shortening, 1/2 cup sugar, and salt.
3. Add half of flour and beat until smooth. Cover and let stand in a warm place overnight.
4. In the morning, add eggs, and enough flour to make a smooth dough. Knead until smooth and elastic.
5. Place dough in a bowl, cover with a warm, damp cloth, and let rise until double in bulk.
6. Knead down and let rise again.
7. When it has doubled in bulk, roll 1/8 to 1/4 inch thick.
8. Brush with melted butter or butter substitute.
9. Cover with 2 cups ground nuts mixed with 2 cups sugar. Spread this mixture about 1/4 inch thick on the rolled dough.
10. Roll like cinnamon rolls but do not cut. Place in a well-oiled pan.
11. Set in a warm place, cover and let rise until treble in bulk.
12. Brush top with melted butter.
13. Bake in hot oven (450°F) 20-25 minutes. Makes 16 servings.
Mrs. Mary G. Cimra, Timblin, PA.
